chunks.text: MFI evolution - 00θ 00-Theta (θ) Date of Fabrication October 2000 Photo of structure 00-Theta Description This structure was constucted in October 2000, in order to validate a 1 DOF design with Thunder actuators. From what I can remember, the paramet

r actuators. From what I can remember, the parameters for this structure are: Fabrication Parameters Fourbar Link lengths : 6,6,6,0.5 mm Flexure material : 12.5 micron polyester Actuator : Thunder actuator. Performance Parameters Motion at resonance

uator. Performance Parameters Motion at resonance : 160 degrees. Resonant Frequency : 140 Hz. Voltage applied to actuator at resonance : 180 V. The DC motion and hence Q were either not measured or not recorded.
